title: Sinjaffe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Sinjaffe''' was a childhood disease that sometimes struck young members of the [[Bitthævrian/Legends|Bitthævrian]] race. It was almost always fatal.<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>

[[Aul Tarrus Vishav]] suffered sinjaffe as a child; however, due to his personal endurance and physical condition, he overcame the illness in only days. His arm since kept some large bands as a memory.<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
